idea-plugin.name: Markit Editor
idea-plugin.description:
A WYSIWYG Markdown editor for IntelliJ IDEA focused on maximum readability and accessibility. Opens as a dedicated tab alongside the default editor, rendering your content in a clean, high-comfort layout designed to eliminate eye strain during long writing sessions.
Key Features: - High-Legibility Typography: Uses Atkinson Hyperlegible (by the Braille Institute) for body text and Geist Mono (by Vercel) for code blocks. - WYSIWYG Editing: Real-time visual feedback with Toast UI Editor. - Seamless Sync: Bi-directional synchronization with the standard IntelliJ editor. - Theme Awareness: Automatically adapts to Light, Dark, and Darcula themes.
